# Status Badges

Add these badges to your README.md to display CI/CD pipeline status.

## CI Status

[![CI](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/ci.yml)

```markdown
[![CI](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
```

## Code Quality

[![Code Quality Checks](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/code-quality.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/code-quality.yml)

```markdown
[![Code Quality Checks](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/code-quality.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/code-quality.yml)
```

## Deploy Status

[![Deploy](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/deploy.yml)

```markdown
[![Deploy](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/deploy.yml)
```

## All Badges Together

For your README.md:

```markdown
## CI/CD Status

[![CI](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Code Quality](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/code-quality.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/code-quality.yml)
[![Deploy](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/InherentTech/inherenttech-platform/actions/workflows/deploy.yml)
```

## Note

Replace `InherentTech/inherenttech-platform` with your actual GitHub organization and repository name.

To get the exact URLs:
1. Go to GitHub Actions in your repo
2. Click on a workflow
3. Click on the "..." menu
4. Select "Copy status badge markdown"
